title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Embedded System, ASICs and ASIPs, design ninga Single
Purpose Processors and Optimization, Introduction to FPFA, Behaviour
synthesis of FPGA using VHDL

title: Module 2
content:
Sensors and Signals, Discretisation of signals and A/D converters,
Quantization Noise, SNR and D/A converters, Arduino Uno, Serial
Communication and Timer, Controller design using Arduino.

title: Module 3
content:
Power Aware Embedded Systems, SD and DD algorithms, Parallel
Operations and VLIW, Code efficiency
DSP  Application and address generation unit, RMS algorithm

title: Module 4
content:
EDF algorithm and Resource constraint issue, Priority Inversion and Priority
Inheritance Protocol, Priority Ceiling Protocol.
